name: skill-router
description: Route subtasks to preselected agent skills before spawning subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Route subtasks to preselected agent skills.
interface.longDescription: Skill Router helps multi-agent workflows choose one skill per subtask before workers start, generate compact preloaded prompts, hash selected skill files, and log routing decisions for review.
defaultPrompt: Route these subtasks with Skill Router.
Compare routed and unrouted skill loading.
